headline: J. M. Smucker’s (NYSE:SJM) Q1 CY2026 Earnings Results: Revenue In Line With Expectations
summary: Packaged foods company J.M Smucker (NYSE:SJM) met Wall Street’s revenue expectations in Q1 CY2026, with sales up 5.8% year on year to $2.27 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $2.77 per share was 5% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

content.title: J. M. Smucker’s (NYSE:SJM) Q1 CY2026 Earnings Results: Revenue In Line With Expectations

headline: The J.M. Smucker Co. Announces Fiscal Year 2026 Fourth Quarter Results and Provides Full-Year Fiscal 2027 Outlook
summary: The J.M. Smucker Co. (NYSE: SJM) today announced results for the fourth quarter of its fiscal year ending April 30, 2026. Financial results for the fourth quarter and fiscal year reflect the divestiture of certain Sweet Baked Snacks value brands on March 3, 2025, and the divestiture of the Voortman® business on December 2, 2024. All comparisons are to the fourth quarter of the prior fiscal year, unless otherwise noted.

content.summary: The J.M. Smucker Co. (NYSE: SJM) today announced results for the fourth quarter of its fiscal year ending April 30, 2026. Financial results for the fourth quarter and fiscal year reflect the divestiture of certain Sweet Baked Snacks value brands on March 3, 2025, and the divestiture of the Voortman® business on December 2, 2024. All comparisons are to the fourth quarter of the prior fiscal year, unless otherwise noted.
